case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. RODNEY SINGH ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGH, RODNEY $7,704.40 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,994.40, SEE SCANNED DOC
